homepage.subTitle: Think Together — Agent-level Chat Terminal that Breaks Linear Limits
homepage.metaDesc: UNIChat - Agent-level Multi-branch Chat Terminal that Breaks Linear Limits
feature.agent.title: Agent-level Architecture
feature.agent.desc: Sessions as Agents. No more tedious role switching, but a deeply bound intelligent interaction experience.
feature.branch.title: True Multi-branch & Variants
feature.branch.desc: Native support for non-linear chat trees. Start branches anytime, compare variants, and master every possibility.
feature.persona.title: Persona System
feature.persona.desc: Ultimate identity definition. Define your identity in a single click.
feature.api.title: All-in-one API Bundler
feature.api.desc: Built-in presets for DeepSeek, Google, LMStudio…… . Custom endpoints supported. Control all your models.
feature.platform.title: Native UX on All Platforms
feature.platform.desc: One codebase, extreme optimization. Deeply adapted for macOS, iOS, Windows, and Android.

macos_guide.title: macOS Installation Guide
macos_guide.subtitle: Bypass "Unverified Developer" warnings
macos_guide.step1.title: 1. Attempt to Open
macos_guide.step1.desc: Double-click UNICHAT in Applications. If a warning appears, click Cancel.
macos_guide.step2.title: 2. System Settings
macos_guide.step2.desc: Go to System Settings -> Privacy & Security. Scroll down to Security.
macos_guide.step3.title: 3. Open Anyway
macos_guide.step3.desc: Find UNICHAT notice and click "Open Anyway". Enter password to confirm.
